zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl於1475年4月19日出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl35歲，母親Lady Eleanor Sinclair of Caithness - Countess of Atholl18歲。他和Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他於1513年登記服兵役。他去世於1521年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德享年46歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾登可爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl于1475年4月19日出生在英国苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl35岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Sinclair of Caithness - Countess of Atholl18岁。他和Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他于1513年登记服兵役。他去世于1521年9月9日在英国諾圖波藍德享年46岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾登可爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl was born on 19 April 1475, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl, was 35 and his mother, Lady Eleanor Sinclair of Caithness - Countess of Atholl, was 18. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl. He registered for military service in 1513. He died on 9 September 1521, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl est né le 19 avril 1475, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Sinclair of Caithness - Countess of Atholl, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1513. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1521, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Dunkeld, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl am 19. April 1475 in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl 35 und seine Mutter Lady Eleanor Sinclair of Caithness - Countess of Atholl 18. Er hatte mit Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1513 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 9. September 1521 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Northumberland, England und wurde in Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl è nato il il 19 aprile 1475 nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Lady Eleanor Sinclair of Caithness - Countess of Atholl, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1513. Morì il 9 settembre 1521, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stewart 2nd Earl of Athollが1475年4月19日にイギリススコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Athollは35歳，母Lady Eleanor Sinclair of Caithness - Countess of Athollは18歳であった。彼はJanet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Athollとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1513年に兵役登録をした。彼は1521年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドで46歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアダンケルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl(이)가 1475년 4월 19일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Sinclair of Caithness - Countess of Atholl(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1521년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 던켈드에 묻혔다.

pt.19 April 1475–9 September 1521: 19 de abril de 1475–9 de setembro de 1521
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl nasceu em 19 de abril de 1475, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eleanor Sinclair of Caithness - Countess of Atholl, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1513. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1521, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl родился 19 апреля 1475 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Sinclair of Caithness - Countess of Atholl, 18. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl. В 1513 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 9 сентября 1521 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности дункелд, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.19 April 1475–9 September 1521: 19 de abril de 1475–9 de septiembre de 1521
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl nació el 19 de abril de 1475, en Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Stewart 1st Earl of Atholl, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Eleanor Sinclair of Caithness - Countess of Atholl, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1513. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1521, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.
